title: Streamlit Community Cloud App
description: Represents a Streamlit application deployed on Community Cloud, connected to a GitHub repository.

id.description: The unique identifier of the deployed app

name.description: The display name of the app

url.description: The public URL where the app is accessible

status.description: The current deployment status of the app

branch.description: The GitHub branch the app is deployed from

mainFile.description: Path to the main Python file within the repository (e.g., app.py)

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the app was first deployed

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the app was last updated or restarted

owner.description: GitHub username or organization that owns the repository
